title: rubus × terribilis
intro: Rubus × terribilis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a hybrid of the Rubus armeniacus and Rubus procerus plants, characterized by its unique dark purple color and thorny stems. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of Rubus × terribilis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain types of cancer. Rubus × terribilis can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
